dir.commands:
declare @message nvarchar(4000), @objectCompactMode char(1), @salesPriceType char(2), @salesPriceTypeName nvarchar(128) select @objectCompactMode = rtrim(val) from options where name = 'm_compact_mode' if @objectCompactMode = '1' select @message = 'setObjectFilterHidden(this, ''nh_kh9'', false);' else select @message = ''
select @salesPriceType = '01', @salesPriceTypeName = case when @@language = 'v' then ten_loai else ten_loai2 end from dmloaigia2 where loai_gia = '01' select 'this._salesPriceType=''' + @salesPriceType+ ''';this._salesPriceTypeName=''' + replace(replace(isnull(@salesPriceTypeName, ''), '\', '\\'), '''', '\''') + ''';set$Form$DefaultValue(this);' + @message as message return
&XMLWhenFilterLoading; &XMLWhenFilterClosing;
select '' as field, '' as message, 'remove$GridReport$Filter(this.grid);' as script return

action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmloaigia2 where loai_gia = @loai_gia) begin select rtrim(xtype) as xtype from dmloaigia2 where loai_gia = @loai_gia return end
